name: BlobTracking
description: Decomposed Blob Track: FFI detection → NN identity tracking → 1€ temporal smoothing → composed HUD overlay. Each HUD element is a separate primitive — eight wgsl_compute SDF passes (brackets, crosshair, center_dot, size_gauge, tick_marks, dashed_connections, midpoint_diamonds, scanline) plus two render_value_overlay labels (hex id, coord readout). Edit any element's WGSL or params in the graph editor to change its look.
